title: QP Evidence for Third-Country Release
alt: Checklist of evidence a QP must verify before certifying an imported batch

items.label: Manufacturing & testing
items.desc: Batch made and tested per the marketing authorisation and GMP

items.label: GMP equivalence
items.desc: Third-country site at least equivalent to EU/UK GMP

items.label: Importation testing
items.desc: Full re-test on import unless a valid MRA removes it

items.label: Supply chain integrity
items.desc: Transport, storage and temperature maintained and documented

items.label: Batch documentation
items.desc: Batch record, CoA and deviations reviewed and acceptable
